DocumentationSubject.Summary: `meta-tabular` creates sanctioned MetaTabular workspaces for modeling tabular analytics artifacts.
Required. Directory where the empty MetaTabular workspace will be created.
Create modeled tabular database objects, including calculation groups, and process unless --no-process is used; processing failures fail the command.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Target database name. Defaults to the modeled database name.
Drop an existing target database before create/deploy.
Deploy metadata only and skip full processing.
Promote a processed tabular database through backup and restore for pre-prod-to-prod promotion; restore does not process.
Source Analysis Services server containing the processed database.
Backup file path accessible to the Analysis Services service accounts.
Drop an existing target database before restore.
Drop a tabular database from an Analysis Services tabular instance with no confirmation prompt.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.

Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Process an existing tabular database, table, or partition.
Partition name or id to process. Requires --table.
Refresh type. Defaults to Full. Common values: Full, DataOnly, Calculate, ClearValues, Automatic, Add, Defragment.
Table name or id to process instead of the whole database.
